targets.rawSql:
WITH
dist_base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        min(timestamp) AS first_seen,
        max(timestamp) AS last_seen,
        countDistinct(toStartOfHour(timestamp)) AS hours_seen
    FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
      AND NOT startsWith(Dist, 'generated_')
    GROUP BY Dist
),

revenue_total AS
(
    SELECT
        sum(net_revenue) AS total_revenue,
        sum(impressions) AS total_revenue_impressions,
        sum(net_revenue) * 1000.0 / nullIf(sum(impressions), 0) AS avg_ecpm
    FROM analytics.publisher_daily
    WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
),

valued AS
(
    SELECT
        d.Dist,
        d.requests,
        d.impressions,
        d.win_rate,
        d.first_seen,
        d.last_seen,
        d.hours_seen,

        r.avg_ecpm,

        d.impressions * r.avg_ecpm / 1000.0 AS est_revenue
    FROM dist_base AS d
    CROSS JOIN revenue_total AS r
),

thresholds AS
(
    SELECT
        quantileExact(0.80)(est_revenue) AS p80,
        quantileExact(0.90)(est_revenue) AS p90,
        quantileExact(0.95)(est_revenue) AS p95,
        quantileExact(0.99)(est_revenue) AS p99
    FROM valued
),

scored AS
(
    SELECT
        v.Dist,
        v.requests,
        v.impressions,
        v.win_rate,
        v.first_seen,
        v.last_seen,
        v.hours_seen,
        v.avg_ecpm,
        v.est_revenue,

        p.p80,
        p.p90,
        p.p95,
        p.p99,

        multiIf(
            v.est_revenue >= p.p99, 'Top 1% / Extreme Outlier',
            v.est_revenue >= p.p95, 'Top 5% / Outlier',
            v.est_revenue >= p.p90, 'Top 10% / Elite',
            v.est_revenue >= p.p80, 'Top 20% / Strong',
            'Base / Bottom 80%'
        ) AS tier,

        multiIf(
            v.est_revenue >= p.p99, 5,
            v.est_revenue >= p.p95, 4,
            v.est_revenue >= p.p90, 3,
            v.est_revenue >= p.p80, 2,
            1
        ) AS capacity_multiplier,

        multiIf(
            v.est_revenue >= p.p99, 1,
            v.est_revenue >= p.p95, 2,
            v.est_revenue >= p.p90, 3,
            v.est_revenue >= p.p80, 4,
            5
        ) AS sort_order
    FROM valued AS v
    CROSS JOIN thresholds AS p
),

tiered AS
(
    SELECT
        sort_order,
        tier,

        multiIf(
            tier = 'Top 1% / Extreme Outlier', concat('>= $', toString(round(any(p99), 2))),
            tier = 'Top 5% / Outlier', concat('>= $', toString(round(any(p95), 2))),
            tier = 'Top 10% / Elite', concat('>= $', toString(round(any(p90), 2))),
            tier = 'Top 20% / Strong', concat('>= $', toString(round(any(p80), 2))),
            concat('< $', toString(round(any(p80), 2)))
        ) AS threshold,

        capacity_multiplier,
        count() AS dist_count,
        sum(requests) AS tier_requests,
        sum(impressions) AS tier_impressions,
        avg(avg_ecpm) AS avg_ecpm,
        sum(est_revenue) AS tier_estimated_revenue,
        sum(est_revenue * capacity_multiplier) AS tier_projected_revenue,
        sum(est_revenue * capacity_multiplier) - sum(est_revenue) AS tier_incremental_revenue
    FROM scored
    GROUP BY
        sort_order,
        tier,
        capacity_multiplier
),

totals AS
(
    SELECT
        count() AS total_dists,
        sum(requests) AS total_requests,
        sum(impressions) AS total_impressions,
        sum(est_revenue) AS total_estimated_revenue,
        sum(est_revenue * capacity_multiplier) AS total_projected_revenue
    FROM scored
)

SELECT
    tier AS "Tier",
    threshold AS "Revenue Threshold",
    dist_count AS "# Dists",

    round(
        100.0 * dist_count / nullIf(total_dists, 0),
        2
    ) AS "% of Dists",

    round(avg_ecpm, 2) AS "Average eCPM",

    round(tier_estimated_revenue, 2) AS "Estimated Revenue",

    round(
        100.0 * tier_estimated_revenue / nullIf(total_estimated_revenue, 0),
        2
    ) AS "% of Revenue",

    capacity_multiplier AS "Capacity Multiplier",

    round(tier_projected_revenue, 2) AS "Projected Revenue",

    round(tier_incremental_revenue, 2) AS "Incremental Revenue",

    round(
        100.0 * tier_incremental_revenue / nullIf(total_estimated_revenue, 0),
        2
    ) AS "% Lift Contribution",

    tier_impressions AS "Impressions",

    round(
        100.0 * tier_impressions / nullIf(total_impressions, 0),
        2
    ) AS "% of Impressions"

FROM tiered
CROSS JOIN totals
ORDER BY sort_order

WITH
dist_base AS
(
    SELECT
        Dist,
        sum(Requests) AS requests,
        sum(Impressions) AS impressions,
        toFloat64(sum(Impressions)) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate,
        min(timestamp) AS first_seen,
        max(timestamp) AS last_seen,
        countDistinct(toStartOfHour(timestamp)) AS hours_seen
    FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
      AND NOT startsWith(Dist, 'generated_')
    GROUP BY Dist
),

dist_totals AS
(
    SELECT
        sum(impressions) AS total_dist_impressions,
        sum(requests) AS total_dist_requests
    FROM dist_base
),

revenue_total AS
(
    SELECT
        sum(net_revenue) AS total_revenue,
        sum(impressions) AS total_revenue_impressions,
        sum(net_revenue) * 1000.0 / nullIf(sum(impressions), 0) AS avg_ecpm
    FROM analytics.publisher_daily
    WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
)

SELECT
    d.Dist AS "Dist",

    d.requests AS "Requests",
    d.impressions AS "Impressions",

    round(d.win_rate * 100, 2) AS "Win Rate %",

    round(
        100.0 * d.impressions / nullIf(t.total_dist_impressions, 0),
        2
    ) AS "Impression Share %",

    round(
        r.avg_ecpm / 1000.0,
        6
    ) AS "Revenue Per Impression",

    round(
        d.impressions * r.avg_ecpm / 1000.0,
        2
    ) AS "Estimated Revenue",

    round(
        r.avg_ecpm,
        2
    ) AS "Average eCPM",

    d.hours_seen AS "Hours Seen",
    d.first_seen AS "First Seen",
    d.last_seen AS "Last Seen"

FROM dist_base AS d
CROSS JOIN dist_totals AS t
CROSS JOIN revenue_total AS r

ORDER BY "Estimated Revenue" DESC
